title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest scanning tools and features. 🌿
points: 🔔 New In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother scanning experience.

title: Critical Bug Fixes
message: Fixed an issue with the camera on certain devices.
